<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="es"><head><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Main Paper - 20º Aniversario y 26ª Campaña Escolar</title>
<!-- BEGIN: Tailwind CSS & Config -->
<script type='text/javascript' nonce='qQrMVobpb/2khcZAFs/KEA==' src='https://contribution.usercontent.google.com/VkbN2sER9_WwUl6D1Q9ken7RSCfCQqw1EUUBLVG_GsWloCYYre7pAWShQtgZMfeVI96xaJG6F7DBxahlkTxsWuU36YhMXr1iR6Lp78EFOBMfl_nhMkIATNygpn6u0SlJAwsGgRAMZHNu3Kz6fnIHurh52FaFZ9nr1PUeBcmDIezakmsG0Zv4C7p3A0e8VlQDHHpjOwvXrbaZjQzUBwAT26I_gT6gzdHDFknmkQEmO0KJnfYfe3jbqwY0l5HMYQejTIJiK6ByIKJXC1FIYc3YgMSAvCQEw-i4UqCmESZYHGogqQ-piktlZBc8fm64eeGzrFns0kNc3QxG5wmbhFE5NcBLDIne_UxeC1eEQ-1mLTwT6UfF1ReZoW6SuCNi8C2GeB979TQNkyrqHp-IFLFqwV3ioD-DWHYlCngBAF3NOJ-Uv80Cf7kjJoYQL7eE8EQvtJTxEBpzZCmNOjUUAWtNGAQm3pImMIqs9wBGS6QEyKPiMRZhq5hIq7YVERFwsUBlbOUT1yDBzu2aTS2HqeqNpnMSgcGjm6LZ5tEbKDz9hl1p_B_RpjkEKkulb7fzFlE77dRKI3ri6hcBDbPbAiWWPCCUy16c9t1N_BgbRoPMifonlHTywqDFPhXL0RfAOcyPJEt0TtVrL070U8dWPJ9YxsELh45ZbHJ7K_zhPtJBAlOnqL4Hu4xwXWsPlMw89C5EwZ77FcGRwglrLT9ZyHFeDPcJSHZ0Lem094seoSA5vZ66Jv2x0OEZTo0QYkCBVq8VGZagArtLuT7MAqILs4vf76uCtEPs38VHqgYCyCyiZiSa-6xyj4Y6'></script><script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<script>
    tailwind.config = {
      theme: {
        extend: {
          colors: {
            brandRed: '#E30613',
            brandYellow: '#FFD700',
            brandSlate: '#1E293B',
          },
          animation: {
            'pulse-fast': 'pulse 1.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite',
          }
        }
      }
    }
  </script>
<!-- END: Tailwind CSS & Config -->
<!-- BEGIN: Custom Styles -->
<style data-purpose="layout-tweaks">
    .bento-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
      grid-template-rows: repeat(2, 1fr);
      gap: 1.5rem;
    }
    @media (max-width: 1024px) {
      .bento-grid {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
        grid-template-rows: auto;
      }
    }
    @media (max-width: 640px) {
      .bento-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }
    }
    .chinese-subtitle {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      opacity: 0.8;
      display: block;
      margin-top: 2px;
    }
  </style>
<!-- END: Custom Styles -->
</head>
<body class="bg-white text-brandSlate font-sans overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- BEGIN: MainHeader -->
<header class="sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white shadow-md border-b-4 border-brandRed">
<div class="container mx-auto px-4 py-3 flex items-center justify-between">
<!-- Logo & Anniversary Badge -->
<div class="flex items-center gap-4" data-purpose="branding"><img alt="Main Paper 20 Aniversario" class="h-16 w-auto" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"/></div>
<!-- Navigation Links -->
<nav class="hidden md:flex items-center space-x-8 font-semibold text-gray-700">
<a class="hover:text-brandRed transition-colors" href="#ofertas">Ofertas</a>
<a class="hover:text-brandRed transition-colors" href="#marcas">Marcas</a>
<a class="hover:text-brandRed transition-colors" href="#vendedor">Contacto</a>
</nav>
<!-- CTA Button -->
<div>
<button class="bg-brandRed text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-full font-bold uppercase tracking-wider animate-pulse-fast hover:scale-105 transition-transform shadow-lg">
          ¡Pide Ahora! <span class="block text-[10px] font-normal">立即下单</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
</header>
<!-- END: MainHeader -->
<!-- BEGIN: HeroSection -->
<section class="relative bg-brandSlate text-white overflow-hidden py-24 lg:py-40">
<div class="absolute inset-0 z-0">
<img alt="Hero Background" class="w-full h-full object-cover opacity-40" src="data:image/png;base64,"/>
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-brandSlate via-brandSlate/80 to-transparent"></div>
</div>
<div class="container mx-auto px-4 relative z-10">
<div class="max-w-4xl">
<h1 class="text-5xl lg:text-8xl font-black mb-6 leading-tight">
        26º CAMPAÑA ESCOLAR <br/>
<span class="text-brandYellow">MAIN PAPER</span>
</h1>
<p class="text-xl lg:text-3xl mb-8 text-gray-200 max-w-2xl font-medium">
        Celebrando 20 años de crecimiento imparable. Servicio preferente en <span class="text-white font-bold underline decoration-brandYellow">Aragón</span> con logística ultra-rápida.
      </p>
<div class="flex flex-wrap gap-4">
<div class="bg-brandRed p-6 rounded-lg shadow-2xl transform -rotate-2 hover:rotate-0 transition-transform">
<span class="block text-4xl font-black italic">50% REGALO</span>
<span class="text-sm uppercase font-bold tracking-widest">Cashback Escolar <span class="chinese-subtitle text-white/80">50% 返现礼品</span></span>
</div>
<div class="bg-brandYellow text-brandRed p-6 rounded-lg shadow-2xl transform rotate-2 hover:rotate-0 transition-transform">
<span class="block text-4xl font-black">+11% DTO</span>
<span class="text-sm uppercase font-bold tracking-widest">Acumulado Aniversario <span class="chinese-subtitle">累计 11% 折扣</span></span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- END: HeroSection -->
<!-- BEGIN: PromotionsBentoGrid -->
<main class="py-20 bg-gray-50" id="ofertas">
<div class="container mx-auto px-4">
<div class="text-center mb-16">
<h2 class="text-4xl font-black uppercase text-brandRed">Grandes Promociones</h2>
<p class="text-gray-600">Ofertas limitadas por el 20º Aniversario</p>
</div>
<div class="bento-grid">
<!-- Activity 1 -->
<div class="bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-lg border-t-8 border-blue-500 flex flex-col justify-between" data-purpose="promo-item">
<div>
<span class="bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 text-xs font-bold px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded uppercase">Actividad 1</span>
<h3 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-4">Oficina &amp; Escuela</h3>
<p class="text-gray-600 mt-2">Básicos imprescindibles para el día a día.</p>
</div>
<div class="mt-8">
<div class="text-4xl font-black text-blue-600">+6+5% OFF</div>
<p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1 uppercase tracking-tighter">Descuento Directo <span class="chinese-subtitle">直接折扣</span></p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Activity 2 (Centerpiece) -->
<div class="md:col-span-2 md:row-span-2 bg-brandRed text-white p-12 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center" data-purpose="promo-hero">
<div class="absolute top-4 right-4 bg-brandYellow text-brandRed font-black px-4 py-1 rounded transform rotate-12">TOP VENTAS</div>
<h3 class="text-2xl font-bold mb-4 uppercase">Actividad 2: Especial Color</h3>
<div class="text-8xl font-black mb-4">50%</div>
<div class="text-3xl font-bold mb-6">CASHBACK <span class="block text-xl opacity-80">Lápices de Colores</span></div>
<div class="bg-white/20 p-6 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/30">
<p class="text-2xl font-bold italic">"Compra 1000€ = Gana 500€"</p>
<p class="text-sm mt-2 opacity-90 font-medium">Bonificación directa en catálogo escolar <br/> <span class="chinese-subtitle">买 1000 欧元送 500 欧元返现</span></p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Activity 3 -->
<div class="bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-lg border-t-8 border-brandYellow flex flex-col justify-between" data-purpose="promo-item">
<div>
<span class="bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800 text-xs font-bold px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded uppercase">Actividad 3</span>
<h3 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-4">Serie PB Profesional</h3>
<p class="text-gray-600 mt-2">Formatos ahorro para gran volumen.</p>
</div>
<div class="mt-8">
<div class="text-4xl font-black text-brandSlate">7+1 / 5+1</div>
<p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1 uppercase tracking-tighter">Unidades de Regalo <span class="chinese-subtitle">多买多送</span></p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Placeholder for Visual Balance -->
<div class="bg-brandSlate text-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center text-center">
<div>
<div class="text-3xl font-bold text-brandYellow">ÚLTIMOS DÍAS</div>
<p class="text-sm opacity-70">Cierre de campaña inminente</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</main><section class="py-20 bg-white">
<div class="container mx-auto px-4">
<div class="flex flex-col lg:flex-row items-center gap-12">
<div class="lg:w-1/2">
<img alt="Product Availability" class="rounded-2xl shadow-2xl w-full object-cover" src="data:image/webp;base64,"/>
</div>
<div class="lg:w-1/2">
<h2 class="text-4xl font-black text-brandSlate mb-6 uppercase tracking-tight">Tu <span class="text-brandRed">One-Stop Shop</span> de Confianza</h2>
<p class="text-xl text-gray-600 mb-8 leading-relaxed">
          Desde óleos Artix hasta material de oficina MP Colours. Todo lo que tu negocio necesita en un solo lugar, con stock garantizado y exposición optimizada para maximizar tus ventas.
        </p>
<ul class="space-y-4">
<li class="flex items-center gap-3 font-bold text-brandSlate">
<span class="bg-brandYellow text-brandRed p-1 rounded-full material-symbols-outlined">check</span>
            Más de 5,000 referencias en stock
          </li>
<li class="flex items-center gap-3 font-bold text-brandSlate">
<span class="bg-brandYellow text-brandRed p-1 rounded-full material-symbols-outlined">check</span>
            Exposiciones listas para punto de venta
          </li>
<li class="flex items-center gap-3 font-bold text-brandSlate">
<span class="bg-brandYellow text-brandRed p-1 rounded-full material-symbols-outlined">check</span>
            Logística propia en todo Aragón
          </li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- END: PromotionsBentoGrid -->
<!-- BEGIN: SubBrands -->
<section class="py-12 bg-white">
<div class="container mx-auto px-4 grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
<!-- Cervantes -->
<div class="group relative h-64 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-xl cursor-pointer">
<img alt="Cervantes" class="w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:scale-110" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDc4epmaYOj37pd93ItwdRnNrlML6N2yMd_i7LLmTJwxUHmP9ZGpQAnhcCKijfSnmfAYl7QRGIKoqg-pP9qvpAyNog4ysA5UFrort7T2B_tuN1Pf07syinz3yYRhGkvxwQoDPpSmDXsIxMA7WcngM0OtHctvuAn-rHWByZBW7QdRp_iX6b9oNBYSMvE7GwktcR71phO_k5XgVzLrEBtBvKMbGvQ4e51rEEFQ5Bh_52BZvYXbGswXejzMs2M2Eddm3P3f0C60yxz4WI"/>
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-black/80 to-transparent flex flex-col justify-center p-8">
<h4 class="text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-2 italic">CERVANTES</h4>
<p class="text-brandYellow font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-sm">Escritura Premium &amp; Oficina</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Artix -->
<div class="group relative h-64 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-xl cursor-pointer">
<img alt="Artix" class="w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:scale-110" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBI1_x1V7TxQg1S3S1GGcnc619z_ZQ6HR6k0whs5yKLBXdgGiD6A9XGTffp3I4p5kE4S34vcdYl1eNxLvPCmcsf_SkiINdfyExETfkLV-b1yM3w25AD3e6Lb6GrsnbsTuLOT6VJBOQwIT1l209jqP3-T8Xe0MOnnMmB115ykCe6DI49U2n2QiS6xpq-j_mppWeZ28u9voxntU7j5MxcJKQybUryZOW95KN8aIf4zx_KMRO7gbqtjVSKrFqm41U305ZZZjxLBb4HqTY"/>
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-brandRed/80 to-transparent flex flex-col justify-center p-8">
<h4 class="text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-2">ARTIX</h4>
<p class="text-white font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-sm">El arte en tus manos</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- END: SubBrands -->
<!-- BEGIN: BrandWall -->
<section class="py-16 bg-gray-50 border-y border-gray-100" id="marcas">
<div class="container mx-auto px-4">
<div class="mb-12 text-center">
<h2 class="text-2xl font-bold text-brandSlate uppercase tracking-widest">Nuestras Marcas de Confianza</h2>
</div>
<div class="mb-12">
<img alt="Main Paper Brands Banner" class="w-full rounded-xl shadow-lg" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"/>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-wrap justify-center items-center gap-12 opacity-60 grayscale hover:grayscale-0 transition-all">
<img alt="Pilot" class="h-8" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuAECKJHq5CEjxFgFM2xBKJkJQ_IY8eFmCBm8UfltQn_0qeKXVvJyVu2Qh7SKsUM6kteqhsHs7e9atEJdgrREmoSB11XqfWy_tK7iIBh6JuTYtAh3UDRARuW8qxY079N6XPQp4JVm6bBSI66YgZNzxf5jZuXHFGB7slk0FoMjjlsjjTuQeudESlPAjJ2M7jhsmLm2qhu1juOLMw_HDXIsu_DPGH83R2hMA6V5Jn37tULbvKBKT5xBFCUTZoztTLVCtX_CkrztacCbzY"/>
<img alt="Bic" class="h-8" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBNXMmNjzP9ElcxxbuvvCffj3D3UIXd9CP0x7no5POouDP7MBd-Qw0ptKw5mHrAYNhPLtFjgDV2pfXbiki_Cj1jqEBTJBNujFSiIWiJ54FjQvPwn3ijvbmOyTtmZRPKTOdzW8UnxKtTOPySij2XvPYl0fUnLVrFGfm6QM0PKWmDNMZBQUfXicd9TkpJafgqXK-Arq6-0b7neCcp1Q-N3amTffAUXolvbY2RyXukf5cHZUUJwnfLCWPjYtPqOLkNGQsUu9EnE1No3G8"/>
<img alt="Oxford" class="h-8" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuBevBiVH2c1eV7VYsXWjoASHPsqLgNKv2SGemcbMkxWYXhDLlf-OtDVFOVxEb1uwbqdCnCcYWk_KIayNjUvQivjUCOySmHDfL4PelawZ0uLlBGrjSIbrHI9tK3ywQLgief1xZ2nJyvA9Pe-er-zg0XdKC_YGagjBfqlc5Pq51zrHhD9Ydpoh38sK8BGDcHwik4FlLAS7-AYLkr-ifOQ0tL7YkMRzkVvU0UWLLY2SXHR1_eSBrtucmYTV8NEQbXkQmKYqa6n2wf9-Ew">
<img alt="Staedtler" class="h-8" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCra2SfNWsVn440t3D8vxc0SecjdJrqzUD352qgcoyoMWStXl0CNP4uGq5YvjczL5pEsoBLlqzFCFKCXMuuSKQbvHY9LBuSLlR1cWB5uScXAhQ8K_g4tZRt1ZETDxKADA8StTHXOgtdjn3SUbc33bDzxjjjnVdKGHDSqPfXsSLxvYSq9Wv98zseYmfLs-ObPcAD_o-RXg7xEmFu9qd8cIXmQdiBAXsLMcH38OxdhtD1tzE1fuJND2_doogzZLgPAyFc-sZU0hamPbo"/>
</img></div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- END: BrandWall -->
<!-- BEGIN: SalesRepSection -->
<section class="py-20 bg-brandYellow" id="reserva">
<div class="container mx-auto px-4">
<div class="bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-2xl p-8 md:p-16 flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-12 items-center">
<div class="lg:w-1/2">
<h2 class="text-4xl font-black text-brandRed mb-4 uppercase">Reserva Ahora</h2>
<p class="text-xl text-brandSlate font-bold mb-6 italic italic">No te quedes sin stock para el inicio de curso.</p>
<p class="text-gray-600 mb-8">
          Asegura tus productos estrella de la 26ª Campaña Escolar. Rellena tus datos y un asesor se pondrá en contacto para formalizar tu pedido con prioridad absoluta.
        </p>
</div>
<div class="lg:w-1/2 w-full">
<form class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4">
<div>
<label class="block text-xs font-bold text-brandSlate uppercase mb-1">Nombre Completo</label>
<input class="w-full border-2 border-gray-100 rounded-lg p-3 focus:border-brandRed outline-none" placeholder="Tu nombre" type="text"/>
</div>
<div>
<label class="block text-xs font-bold text-brandSlate uppercase mb-1">Nombre de la Tienda / Empresa</label>
<input class="w-full border-2 border-gray-100 rounded-lg p-3 focus:border-brandRed outline-none" placeholder="Tu papelería" type="text"/>
</div>
<div>
<label class="block text-xs font-bold text-brandSlate uppercase mb-1">Valor Estimado del Pedido (€)</label>
<input class="w-full border-2 border-gray-100 rounded-lg p-3 focus:border-brandRed outline-none" placeholder="Ej: 1000" type="number"/>
</div>
<button class="bg-brandRed text-white font-black py-4 rounded-lg uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-brandSlate transition-colors shadow-lg mt-2" type="submit">
            Pre-order Now | 立即预订
          </button>
</form>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section><section class="py-20 bg-brandSlate text-white" id="vendedor">
<div class="container mx-auto px-4">
<div class="bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-12 flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-12 backdrop-blur-md">
<div class="relative">
<div class="w-48 h-48 rounded-full border-4 border-brandRed overflow-hidden shadow-2xl">
<img alt="Sales Rep" class="w-full h-full object-cover" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCD7k3T8JFQBnxS86aCJI3HKm6qeiQAf7kSLu9G1fyH1LPX8lOf_-PhEy2tgMYYzK_zPoyZ71bPSng6-XM4yKK7Ta6zc2D0y3GgoHLa2tTXvL2fDJ5qWnY291oUk_LAhEMP55W1Q1RQwBV1prnBXljQ6SpsG9ozslJtb0rD0mfGE2XNLFi27-Av7lJ_GzhKVp7arxvVrQClH4mrEIkXWLQrYL4-XyknYCHnx61ZaRWXZ70GaC8PecoSaSZCYuP4CH9eiMpNuRhSGGQ"/>
</div>
<div class="absolute -bottom-2 -right-2 bg-green-500 w-6 h-6 rounded-full border-4 border-brandSlate animate-pulse"></div>
</div>
<div class="flex-1 text-center md:text-left">
<h3 class="text-3xl font-bold mb-2">Tu Partner Tecnológico</h3>
<p class="text-brandYellow font-mono mb-4">Digital Business &amp; IT Specialist</p>
<p class="text-gray-400 max-w-xl mb-6">
            Especializado en digitalización de puntos de venta y suministros corporativos de alta eficiencia. Transformamos tu papelería tradicional en un negocio del siglo XXI con el respaldo de Main Paper.
          </p>
<div class="flex flex-wrap justify-center md:justify-start gap-4">
<button class="bg-white text-brandSlate px-6 py-3 rounded-lg font-bold flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-brandYellow transition-colors">
<svg class="h-5 w-5" fill="currentColor" viewbox="0 0 20 20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path d="M2 3a1 1 0 011-1h2.153a1 1 0 01.986.836l.74 4.435a1 1 0 01-.54 1.06l-1.548.773a11.037 11.037 0 006.105 6.105l.774-1.548a1 1 0 011.059-.54l4.435.74a1 1 0 01.836.986V17a1 1 0 01-1 1h-2C7.82 18 2 12.18 2 5V3z"></path>
</svg>
              Contactar Especialista
            </button>
<div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-400">
<span class="w-2 h-2 bg-green-500 rounded-full"></span>
              Disponible ahora en Aragón
            </div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- END: SalesRepSection -->
<!-- BEGIN: Footer -->
<footer class="bg-gray-100 py-12 border-t border-gray-200">
<div class="container mx-auto px-4 text-center">
<div class="mb-8 font-black text-2xl text-brandRed">MAIN PAPER</div>
<p class="text-gray-500 text-sm mb-4">
        © 2024 Main Paper S.L. - 20 Años Innovando en el Sector de la Papelería. <br/>
        26ª Campaña Escolar | Aragón, España.
      </p>
<div class="flex justify-center space-x-6 text-gray-400">
<a class="hover:text-brandRed" href="#">Aviso Legal</a>
<a class="hover:text-brandRed" href="#">Privacidad</a>
<a class="hover:text-brandRed" href="#">Catálogo 2024</a>
</div>
</div>
</footer>
<!-- END: Footer -->
</body></html>
